product: NetApp ONTAP REST API — identity/capability probe (whoami, ONTAP 9.19.1+)

auth.note: sent on every request; error text never contains the password; TLS validation is never disabled

status_semantics.200: whoami supported; report username/roles/privileges; no fallback request
status_semantics.404 on whoami: endpoint absent (pre-9.19.1 cluster): fall back to cluster_fallback exactly once and report whoamiSupported=false with the login username and empty roles/privileges
status_semantics.403: permission denied: raise OntapPermissionException (an OntapApiException) with the decoded code/message; NEVER fall back
status_semantics.401: authentication failure: raise plain OntapApiException; NEVER fall back
status_semantics.404 on cluster_fallback: surface the OntapApiException; no further requests

tls_rule: the client builder must expose insecureTls() that always throws UnsupportedOperationException naming TLS; there is no supported way to disable certificate validation

unsupported.message: The requested resource /api/security/login/whoami does not exist
